problem id: 07434d56
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  10100010 -> 00110100
  00110110 -> 01100110
  01000101 -> 01011000
  10100101 -> 01000100
  10101110 -> 11110101
  11110100 -> 01011110
  11110101 -> 01001110
  11101110 -> 11111101

query: 01001101
predicted answer: 11011001
